base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of map_tileset_atlas — a tile (tile_atlas) from 1988 super mario bros 3. Master overworld-map tile atlas — all terrain types, nodes, paths. 2063×670 canvas. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
